decisions.decision: Split cargo test --all-features into cargo test --workspace + cargo check --all-features
decisions.rationale: --all-features was 45+ min cold build; hardware tests ignored anyway; split is faster and equally thorough

decisions.decision: send_ipc_message sends JSON+\n in one write_all
decisions.rationale: Two separate writes caused Broken pipe race under --test-threads=4

decisions.decision: GPG key generated with prodnull@proton.me UID, stored in GH secrets + 1Password
decisions.rationale: Real reachable email allows keys.openpgp.org verification

decisions.decision: kubectl tokens HARD-FAIL on cnf presence + audience isolation to PAM validator
decisions.rationale: kubectl cannot send DPoP proofs; cnf-bound tokens would break k8s auth

decisions.decision: DT-B split into 4 plans (postinst wiring, FIPS audit, operator docs, fleet runtime tests)
decisions.rationale: SELinux/AppArmor policies already done in parallel; clean wave structure

decisions.decision: ADR-021 accepted with changes — Decision A (v1.0 middleware) and Decision B (helper split) must be separated
decisions.rationale: Conflating target architecture with shipped architecture lets project claim privilege separation it doesn't have

next_action: Check release run 24286961692 status via gh run view. If still queued >30min more, consider stripping macOS matrix or building locally. If passed: publish draft release, watch publish-repo.yml, then write crypto-posture.md + pqc-readiness.yml.
context_notes: Long overnight CI fix loop. Fixed 9+ distinct issues: libdbus, libtss2, security gate false positive, ml-dsa API breaking change (rc.7→rc.8), migration_pairs mut, LICENSE cp, Cargo cache, split compile/test, atomic IPC write race. All code fixes verified locally. Current blocker is pure GitHub runner congestion. Also drafted 4 DT-B phase plans for Codex review, delivered ADR-021 architectural review with 13 redlines, fixed Gemini TOCTOU + dependency security findings, ran 1Password + GH secrets for GPG key. Integration-docker.yml test workflow created — step_up_ipc and keyutils already passing, TPM+SPIRE fixes pushed but not verified.
